response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, which aligns with the role's tooling. However, the resume lacks concrete evidence of shipping production GenAI/RAG systems, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks at scale, and there is no demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership typical of a Forward Deployed Engineer role. Worth a screening call to probe depth of recent AI work.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent ecosystems) well over the 8-year bar
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and technical community leadership
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines
No clear evidence of cloud-platform AI system design (AWS/GCP/Azure ML services)
Limited demonstration of customer-facing discovery or enterprise delivery responsibilities
